summary: Comprehensive testing completed for weROI lead generation website remodel. All backend APIs (100%) and frontend features (100%) working correctly. 5-step audit form, Trust Ticker, interactive service cards, ultra-minimal footer, and Thank You page all functioning as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Email automation (Resend) is functional code but email_1_sent remains false - likely due to placeholder API key. Leads are stored correctly regardless.
seed_data_creation: Test leads created via pytest with TEST_ prefix for easy identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs: /api/leads/audit (POST/GET), /api/leads/guide (POST/GET), /api/leads/stats (GET), /api/emails/process-scheduled (POST). Frontend: Homepage with Trust Ticker, 3 interactive service cards with hover effects, ultra-minimal footer. /audit page has 5-step form (Name→Phone→Email→Company→How Found Us) with progress bar and validation. /thank-you page shows video placeholder and next steps. Exit intent popup triggers after 5 seconds when mouse leaves top of window.

backend_api: GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns weROI API message
POST /api/leads/audit - Creates audit lead with all fields
GET /api/leads/audit - Returns list of audit leads
POST /api/leads/guide - Creates guide lead with email sequence fields
GET /api/leads/guide - Returns list of guide leads
GET /api/leads/stats - Returns lead counts and recent leads
frontend_homepage: Nav CTA shows 'Claim Your Free AI Growth Audit'
Hero CTA shows 'Claim Your Free AI Growth Audit'
Trust Ticker displays with 12 items (6 unique, duplicated for scroll)
Trust Ticker contains: Measurable AI Growth, Bespoke Scaling Systems, Automated ROI Architecture
3 interactive service cards with hover effects
Service cards show blur background and Learn More button on hover
Ultra-minimal footer with logo, copyright, and single CTA
frontend_audit_form: Step 2: Phone input with validation (rejects invalid format)
Step 3: Email input with validation (rejects invalid format)
Step 5: How found us with 6 options
mobile_responsive: Form content visible and accessible on mobile viewport (390x844)

notes.email_automation: Resend email integration is implemented but requires valid API key (RESEND_API_KEY in backend/.env). Currently using placeholder. Leads are stored regardless of email sending status.
notes.exit_intent_popup: Triggers after 5 seconds when mouse leaves top of window. Only triggers once per session (stored in sessionStorage).
